name: tokopt-skills
description: Token-optimization skills and agents for the tokopt CLI. Adds the @token-doctor orchestrator agent, the @prompt-optimizer propose-only critic, and nine on-demand skills (token-audit, prompt-anatomy, antipattern-scan, heavy-tail, slim-suggest, slim-apply, slim-rewind, hygiene-coach, prompt-optimizer) so Copilot CLI can measure, diagnose, and remediate token consumption in any Copilot/agent repository.
